---
name: Add i18n support (English + one other language)
about: Add basic internationalization and translations
title: Add i18n support (English + one other language)
labels: ["enhancement", "frontend"]

---

Add basic internationalization support and provide translations for English and one additional language (e.g., Spanish).

Acceptance criteria:
- Integrate a lightweight i18n library
- Provide translation files and a language switcher
- Document how to update translations
